title:
Optimization Strategies for Enhancing
Resource Efficiency in Transformers &
Large Language Models
original_query:
Optimization Strategies for Enhancing
Resource Efficiency in Transformers &
Large Language Models Advancements in Natural Language Processing are heavily reliant on the Transformer architecture, whose improvements come at substantial resource costs due to ever-growing model sizes. This study explores optimization techniques, including Quantization, Knowledge Distillation, and Pruning, focusing on energy and computational efficiency while retaining performance. Among standalone methods, 4-bit Quantization significantly reduces energy use with minimal accuracy loss. Hybrid approaches, like NVIDIA’s Minitron approach combining KD and Structured Pruning, further demonstrate promising trade-offs between size reduction and accuracy retention. A novel optimization equation is introduced, offering a flexible framework for comparing various methods. Through the investigation of these compression methods, we provide valuable insights for developing more sustainable and efficient LLMs, shining a light on the often-ignored concern of energy efficiency.111A full list of links to all models used, in addition to supplemental data, is provided at https://github.com/OptimizationStrategies/Optimization-Strategies.

llm_profile.research_problem: 如何在保持性能的前提下提高Transformer和大语言模型的资源效率，减少计算和能源消耗
llm_profile.main_method: 量化、知识蒸馏、剪枝以及它们的混合方法
llm_profile.task_domain: 自然语言处理，大语言模型优化
llm_profile.retrieval_description: 该研究聚焦于提升Transformer和大语言模型的资源效率，通过量化、知识蒸馏和剪枝等技术降低计算和能源消耗。适合检索与模型压缩、高效训练及可持续AI相关的研究工作。

llm_enhanced_query: 该研究聚焦于提升Transformer和大语言模型的资源效率，通过量化、知识蒸馏和剪枝等技术降低计算和能源消耗。适合检索与模型压缩、高效训练及可持续AI相关的研究工作。 Transformer 量化 知识蒸馏 剪枝 资源效率
